name: Tower of Nirale RPG (BETA)
description:
[You stand at the base of the Tower of Nirale—a sprawling, impossible structure that pierces through the firmament of dreams and memory.]

Shrouded in iridescent mists and impossible geometry, the tower is both sanctuary and prison, filled with relics of forgotten gods and emotions too ancient to name.

Each floor is a world unto itself—shifting with thought, resonating with the soul of the intruder, and tailored to test more than mere strength.

Time bends within Nirale; memories leak from the walls like dew, and echoes of the self are known to return... different.

Some rooms whisper in languages only the sleeping understand. Others burn with celestial fire, sealed by ancient laws older than magic itself.

Monsters of the Mind—beings born from shame, pride, or buried wishes—guard every ascent, feeding on emotion, shifting form based on fear.

The Tower itself responds to your choices. Mercy can open paths steel cannot. Cruelty may grant power—but at a cost buried too deep to name.

Many have climbed Nirale. Few return. Fewer still come back whole.

Those who reach the higher sanctums speak of the Archive of Souls, a chamber where the memories of every climber are stored like stardust in glass.

Legends say the summit reveals not a throne—but a mirror. A final truth so absolute it unmakes the false self entirely.

Will you ascend seeking redemption? Or will you climb to conquer your past? Perhaps, like so many before, you'll become just another whisper within its walls.

The Tower watches. And it remembers.
